title: FairCast – Secure Android Voting System
description: A secure Android voting application featuring biometric face authentication with 95% security improvement, real-time vote updates, and multi-module architecture.
purpose: Designed a secure, scalable voting platform with modern authentication mechanisms and real-time database synchronization.
learningOutcome: Mastered Kotlin development with Firebase integration, implemented face authentication APIs, learned Firestore real-time database optimization, and designed modular Android architecture using Fragments.

title: Dharma – MERN Stack Web Application
description: A backend-focused scalable web application demonstrating full-stack development with optimized MongoDB queries, RESTful API design, and modular architecture.
purpose: Built a production-grade full-stack application showcasing backend optimization and system design principles.
learningOutcome: Advanced MERN stack proficiency, efficient MongoDB query optimization, scalable REST API design, JWT authentication, and async/await patterns with Node.js.

title: Fake News Detection – ML + Android Integration
description: End-to-end machine learning system achieving 92–95% accuracy with Logistic Regression, Naive Bayes, and Random Forest models, integrated into Android frontend.
purpose: Developed an intelligent fake news detector demonstrating ML pipeline creation, model evaluation, and mobile app integration.
learningOutcome: Expert-level data preprocessing and EDA with Pandas & Seaborn, trained and compared multiple ML models, achieved high accuracy through feature engineering, and successfully bridged ML backend with Android UI.
